metadata.description: A plugin marketplace for Claude Code — pre-packaged skills for diagrams, code audits, dev servers, and markdown optimization.

plugins.name: mermaid
plugins.description: Generate, validate, render Mermaid diagrams from text or code

plugins.name: merge-checks
plugins.description: Audit code changes across 13 quality dimensions

plugins.name: dev-setup
plugins.description: Generate dev server lifecycle scripts with pool-based port isolation

plugins.name: trim-md
plugins.description: Trim and optimize markdown files for LLM agent consumption

plugins.name: plugin-updater
plugins.description: Auto-update third-party marketplace plugins on session start

plugins.name: d2
plugins.description: Generate, validate, render D2 diagrams from text or code
